sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 마이크론, AI 데이터 센터 수요 성장에 힘입어 2025 회계연도 4분기 및 연간 역대급 매출 기록

keyPoints.text: AI 데이터 센터 부문의 강력한 성장세에 힘입어 2025 회계연도 4분기 및 연간 매출 모두 역대 최고치를 달성함.
영업 현금 흐름이 전년 동기 대비 크게 증가하며 재무 건전성이 대폭 개선됨.

businessChanges.text: AI 기회 선점을 위한 전략적 포지셔닝을 강화하고 있으며, 이를 통해 향후 성장을 가속화할 계획임.

financialHighlights.text: 2025 회계연도 연간 매출은 373억 8,000만 달러로 전년 251억 1,000만 달러 대비 크게 증가함.
4분기 영업 현금 흐름은 57억 3,000만 달러로, 전 분기 46억 1,000만 달러 및 전년 동기 34억 1,000만 달러를 상회함.

watchItems.text: 경영진이 제시한 차기 분기 매출 12억 달러 순증가 및 매출총이익률 50% 상회 목표 달성 여부.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a2025q4ex991-pressrelease.htm EX-99.1 EARNINGS RELEASE Document Exhibit 99.1 FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Contacts: Satya Kumar Mark Plungy Investor Relations Media Relations satyakumar@micron.com mplungy@micron.com (408) 450-6199 (408) 203-2910 MICRON TECHNOLOGY, INC. REPORTS RESULTS FOR THE FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL YEAR OF FISCAL 2025 Record fiscal Q4 and full-year revenue driven by AI data center growth Forecasting $1.2 billion in sequential revenue growth with gross margins exceeding 50% BOISE, Idaho, September 23, 2025 – Micron Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: MU) today announced results for its fourth quarter and full year of fiscal 2025, which ended August 28, 2025. Fiscal Q4 2025 highlights • Revenue of $11.32 billion versus $9  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.2 billion = 12억 달러; $11.32 billion = 113억 2,000만 달러; $9.30 billion = 93억 달러; $7.75 billion = 77억 5,000만 달러; $3.20 billion = 32억 달러; $1.2 = 1.2달러; $11.32 = 11.32달러; $9.30 = 9.30달러; $3.20 = 3.20달러; $7.75 = 7.75달러; $2.83 = 2.83달러.

Fiscal 2025 highlights: revenue was $37.38 billion versus $25.11 billion; GAAP net income was $8.54 billion, or $7.59 per diluted share; non-GAAP net income was $9.47 billion, or $8.29 per diluted share; operating cash flow was $17.53 billion versus $8.51 billion. Q4 operating cash flow was $5.73 billion versus $4.61 billion for the prior quarter and $3.41 billion for the same period last year. Normalized numeric aliases: $37.38 billion = 373억 8,000만 달러; $25.11 billion = 251억 1,000만 달러; $8.54 billion = 85억 4,000만 달러; $9.47 billion = 94억 7,000만 달러; $17.53 billion = 175억 3,000만 달러; $8.51 billion = 85억 1,000만 달러; $5.73 billion = 57억 3,000만 달러; $4.61 billion = 46억 1,000만 달러; $3.41 billion = 34억 1,000만 달러; $7.59 = 7.59달러; $8.29 = 8.29달러.

Quarterly table: FQ4-25 revenue was $11,315 million, with prior periods $9,301 million and $7,750 million; GAAP gross margin was 5,054 million and non-GAAP gross margin was 5,169 million. Operating-expense row starts 1,400 / 1,339 / 1,215 / 1,214 / 1,133, with the truncated remainder omitted. Normalized numeric aliases: 11,315 million = 113억 1,500만 달러; 9,301 million = 93억 100만 달러; 7,750 million = 77억 5,000만 달러; 5,054 million = 50억 5,400만 달러; 5,169 million = 51억 6,900만 달러; 1,214 million = 12억 1,400만 달러.
